title: Improve empty portfolio onboarding with clearer next actions
problem: Observed ux friction from local scout signals. Current behavior leaves measurable value on the table for end-users or operators. Without intervention, this problem repeats and reduces trust, clarity, or delivery speed. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
proposed_change: Scope: deliver one focused functional improvement with clear acceptance criteria. Implementation approach: touch only the highest-leverage files, keep blast-radius small, and add explicit verification steps. Validation plan: run required checks and provide reproducible artifacts (diff, tests, outcome summary). Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Primary outcome: concrete improvement in user-facing quality or system reliability. Secondary outcome: clearer operational visibility and lower chance of repeat regressions. Decision outcome: human reviewer can approve/reject with transparent evidence. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
success_metrics: At least one measurable before/after signal is present in artifacts.
Reviewer can verify impact from summary + evidence without guessing intent.
kpi_target: In src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx, improve one measurable QA/flow metric from baseline >=3/10 ambiguity/fail cases to <=1/10 across a 20-case checklist.
benchmark_delta: Baseline: src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx lacks one benchmark-aligned clarity/reliability pattern. Target: implement the missing pattern and document >=70% gap closure with before/after notes.
risk_controls: Scope lock: modify only src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx with one functional intent.
Rollback guard: revert single-file patch if lint/unit/required checks fail.
Gate: do not move to review_ready without verification artifacts and check pass evidence.
non_goals: No broad redesign outside scoped files.
No production deploy automation without explicit human approval.

change_spec.change: Implement one concrete change in src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx with explicit acceptance criteria, reviewer checklist references, and minimal blast radius.
change_spec.why: Directly closes detected signal-to-benchmark gap with scoped implementation.

rollback_plan: Revert local branch to previous commit, remove generated artifacts for this job, and restore previous state snapshot.
